Splash_Screen_Description: Create notes and export them in universal format :)
Confirm_Reset_Note_Description: Are you sure you want to delete this note?
Confirm_New_Reset_Note_Description: Are you sure you want to create a new note? This action will delete your current note!
Confirm_Delete_Backups_Description: Are you sure you want to delete all backup files?
Modal_Settings_AutoSave_Description: Set the time interval for automatically saving your notes.
Modal_Settings_Language_Description: Choose the language of the application.
Global_Modal_Open_Note_Description: When you open a new note, your current note along with all your changes will be permanently deleted.
Global_Modal_Open_Note_Bold: Make sure you have exported your note before opening a new one.
Error_Editor_Folder: The EditorModules > EditorJS folder was not found in the application root.
Error_Notes_Not_Found: No notes were found, please create a new one
Error_Update_Note: Error when trying to update the note
Error_App_Update_Note: The application was unable to update the current note.
Error_AutoSave: An error occurred when trying to update the AutoSave settings
Error_AutoSave_Retrive: An error occurred while retrieving the AutoSave settings from the database
Description_Restart_Application: You need to restart the application for the new language settings to take effect
Error_Language_Update: An error occurred during the language update process
Error_Note_Export: An error occurred while exporting the note.
Error_Note_Import: An error occurred while importing notes
Error_Invalid_Json: The selected file does not contain valid JSON
Error_Invalid_Markdown: The selected file does not contain valid Markdown.
Error_Settings_Update: An error occurred while updating the settings.
Error_Metadata_Update: An error occurred while updating the note metadata.
Error_Invalid_Json_Key_Block: The JSON does not contain the required 'blocks' key
Error_Backup_File: Error when trying to create backup file
Error_Backup_Folder_Stats: Error getting statistics from backup folder:
Error_Backup_Folder_Exists: The backups folder does not exist
Error_App_Settings_Not_Found: The application settings were not found. The application needs to be closed.
Export_Note_Message: Choose the file type you want to export your note to:
Export_Markdown_ImageMode_Embedded: Keep images inside the note file
Title_Export_Note_Select_Folder: Select a folder to export the note
Export_Note_Success_Message: The note has been successfully exported to the desired format.
Description_Backup_Limit: The backup folder has exceeded 600 MB of usage. Go to settings to clean up. The system will continue to back up your notes even if the limit has been exceeded.
Error_Update_BackupSize: Error trying to hide limit message.
Modal_Settings_Description_System_Messag: Restore system messages to default settings. Any messages you chose to hide will be shown again.
Error_Restore_Messages: An error occurred while restoring system messages.
Focus_Mode_Toast: Focus Mode enabled. Press Esc or Ctrl+Shift+F to exit.
Focus_Mode_Footer_Message: Focus Mode enabled. Press Esc or Ctrl+Shift+F to exit.
Recent_File_Not_Found_Description: This file no longer exists. Remove it from recent files?
Modal_Settings_FileAssociation_Descripti: Add this app as an option to open JSON and Markdown files.
Modal_Settings_FileAssociation_Checkbox: Show Minimal Text Editor Lite in Open with
Modal_Settings_Theme_Description: Choose how the application should look.
Modal_Settings_Markdown_Description: Configure how Markdown files are imported and exported.
Modal_Settings_Markdown_FrontMatter: Include YAML front matter when exporting Markdown
Metadata_Description: Metadata is stored with the current note. It is currently used for Markdown front matter and Markdown asset export naming, and can be reused by future PDF, DOCX, and HTML metadata features.
Metadata_Save_Success_Message: The note metadata was saved successfully.
